title: hedypnois polymorpha subsp. cretica
intro: Hedypnois polymorpha subsp. cretica, also known as the Cretan hedge bedstraw, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the family Rosaceae. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. The plant is believed to provide health benefits such as reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating digestive issues. The herbal preparations of Hedypnois polymorpha subsp. cretica include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be made by drying and processing the plant's leaves and flowers.
